form.formComment: Was out of placings last time when sixth (32.04) at Manukau in a Class 3/4. Will jump from box 1 for the first time. Among the chances on his best efforts.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by a neck over 527m at Manukau in a handy 31.47, beating Wow She's Slow. Yet to be beaten in three starts out of this box. Easy to like and looms as a strong winning chance.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (26.55) when sixth over 457m at this track in a Class 4/5. Goes well out of this box with a win and six minors. Must respect.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished last over 457m at this track beaten 8 lengths (26.55) behind Simek in a Class 3/4 on March 26. Placed two back at this track. Can bounce back. Major threat on best form.
